description.short: Agentic multi-vendor software commerce, grounded by Microsoft IQ.
description.full: MarketMesh registers any software vendor, makes products searchable and configurable, and assembles cost-optimised, incentive-aware, human-approved cross-vendor deals. Grounded by Work IQ (buyer signals), Fabric IQ (product ontology) and Foundry IQ (grounded retrieval). All data is synthetic; checkout runs in DRY_RUN.
